member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellCheckerLocalizationProvider
member.summary: RadSpellChecker localization provider.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellCheckerStringId
member.summary: RadSpellChecker localization strings.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker
member.summary: Represents a component that provides spell checking functionality for various text-based controls in Windows Forms applications.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.AutoSpellCheckControl
member.summary: Gets or sets the control that will be automatically spell checked as the user types. Supports TextBox, RichTextBox, RadTextBox, RadTextBoxControl, and RadAutoCompleteBox controls.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.SetAutoSpellChecker(System.Object)
member.summary: Sets up the appropriate spell checker for the specified control to enable auto spell checking.
member.param: The control object to enable auto spell checking for.
member.returns: True if the specified control is supported for auto spell checking; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.EnableCompleteMessageBox
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether the "Spell check complete" message box is displayed when spell checking is finished.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.FormSettings
member.summary: Gets the form settings that control the appearance and behavior of the spell checking dialog.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.SpellCheckMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the spell checking mode that determines whether to check text word-by-word or all at once.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.ThemeName
member.summary: Gets or sets control's preferred theme name. Themes are stored and retrieved using APIs of .
member.remarks: If ThemeResolutionService.ApplicatonThemeName refers to a non-empty string, the theme of a RadControl can differ from the one set using RadControls.ThemeName property. If the themes differ, the RadControls.ThemeName property will be overridden by ThemeResolutionService.ApplicatonThemeName. If no theme is registered with a name as ThemeResolutionService.ApplicatonThemeName, then control will revert to the theme specified by its ThemeName property. If ThemeName is assigned to a non-existing theme name, the control may have no visual properties assigned, which will cause it look and behave in unexpected manner. If ThemeName equals empty string, control's theme is set to a theme that is registered within ThemeResolutionService with the name "ControlDefault".

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.SpellingFormStartPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the start position of the spelling dialog form when it is displayed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.Check(System.Windows.Forms.Control)
member.summary: Checks the specified edit control for spelling mistakes and displays appropriate dialogs based on the current .
member.param: The control to check for spelling mistakes.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.RegisterControlSpellChecker(System.Type,Telerik.WinControls.UI.IControlSpellChecker)
member.summary: Registers an instance of that is responsible for managing the spell checking of a specific type of control.
member.param: The type of control to be associated with the spell checker.
The spell checker implementation that will handle the specified control type.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.GetControlSpellChecker(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the appropriate spell checker for the specified control type. If no exact match is found, searches through the inheritance hierarchy to find a compatible spell checker.
member.param: Type of the edit control to find a spell checker for.
member.returns: An instance that can handle the specified control type, or null if no suitable spell checker is registered.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.CheckAllAtOnce(Telerik.WinControls.UI.IControlSpellChecker)
member.summary: Performs spell checking on the entire text content at once using a dialog that displays all misspelled words.
member.param: The control spell checker to use for checking spelling.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.ShowSpellCheckingCompleteDialog(System.Windows.Forms.Form)
member.summary: Displays a message box indicating that the spell checking process has been completed.
member.param: The parent form for the message box, or null if no specific parent is required.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.CheckWordByWord(Telerik.WinControls.UI.IControlSpellChecker)
member.summary: Performs spell checking one word at a time, displaying a dialog for each misspelled word found.
member.param: The control spell checker to use for checking spelling.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.ShowWindowForNextError(Telerik.WinControls.UI.IControlSpellChecker)
member.summary: Displays a spell check dialog for the next spelling error found in the text.
member.param: The control spell checker to use for identifying spelling errors.
member.returns: The result of the dialog interaction, or DialogResult.None if no errors are found or the dialog is canceled.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.CopyWindowSettings(Telerik.WinControls.UI.FormSettings,Telerik.WinControls.UI.FormSettings)
member.summary: Copies form settings from one FormSettings object to another.
member.param: The source FormSettings object.
The destination FormSettings object.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.GetSpellCheckerParentForm(Telerik.WinControls.UI.IControlSpellChecker)
member.summary: Gets the parent form of the control being spell checked.
member.param: The spell checker containing the control to find the parent form for.
member.returns: The parent form of the control being spell checked, or null if the control or spell checker is null.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.CopyFormSettings(Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadForm,Telerik.WinControls.UI.FormSettings)
member.summary: Copies form settings from a RadForm to a FormSettings object.
member.param: The source RadForm to copy settings from.
The destination FormSettings object to copy settings to.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.CopyFormSettings(Telerik.WinControls.UI.FormSettings,Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadForm)
member.summary: Copies form settings from a FormSettings object to a RadForm.
member.param: The source FormSettings object to copy settings from.
The destination RadForm to copy settings to.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.SpellingFormShowing
member.summary: Occurs when a spelling form is about to be displayed, providing an opportunity to customize or cancel the form.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.OnSpellingFormShowing(Telerik.WinControls.UI.SpellingFormShowingEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the event.
member.param: The event arguments containing the spelling form information.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadSpellChecker.ShouldSerializeAutoSpellCheckControl(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the AutoSpellCheckControl property should be serialized.
member.param: The value to check for serialization.
member.returns: True if the value is not null and should be serialized; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Draws the red lines.

member.summary: Draws a red line at the given from and to
member.param: the graphics context
the from point
the to point

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.TextBoxSpellChecker.PerformAsYouTypeSpellChecking(System.Windows.Forms.TextBoxBase)
member.summary: Performs the spell checking on the control.
member.param: the control

member.summary: A thread start method that waits for the specified idle time to elapse.
member.param: the parameter

member.summary: Adds the current text range to the selection ranges of the document.

member.summary: Sets the selection of the document to the current text range.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.DocumentSpellChecker.DictionaryList
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of dictionaries used by SpellChecker. Generally, this property is not intended to be used directly from your code, rather it is set automatically by MEF.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.DocumentSpellChecker.AddDictionary(Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.IWordDictionary,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Adds a dictionary with the specified culture to the spell checker. If a dictionary with this culture already exists, it is overwritten.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.DocumentSpellChecker.AddDictionary(System.Lazy{Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.IWordDictionary},System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Adds a lazily initialized dictionary with the specified culture to the spell checker. If a dictionary with this culture already exists, it is overwritten.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.DocumentSpellChecker.RemoveDictionary(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Removes the dictionary with the specified culture from the spell checker. This method returns false if no such dictionary is found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.DocumentSpellChecker.AddCustomDictionary(Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.ICustomWordDictionary,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Adds a custom dictionary with the specified culture to the spell checker. If a dictionary with this culture already exists, it is overwritten.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.DocumentSpellChecker.RemoveCustomDictionary(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Removes the custom dictionary with the specified culture from the spell checker. This method returns false if no such dictionary is found.

members.member: Prefixes when present which are not pronounced
Maximum length of an encoding, default is 4
Sets the maxCodeLen. @param maxCodeLen The maxCodeLen to set
Determines whether or not a value is of slavo-germanic orgin. A value is of slavo-germanic origin if it contians any of 'W', 'K', 'CZ', or 'WITZ'.
Determines whether or not a character is a vowel or not
Gets the character at index index if available, otherwise it returns Character.MIN_VALUE so that there is some sort of a default
* Determines whether value contains any of the criteria starting * at index start and matching up to length length
Inner class for storing results, since there is the optional alternate encoding.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RadWordsDictionary
member.summary: Represents a class which is used to import dictionary files containing only words seprated by new line, or just define custom dictionary using set of words.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RadWordsDictionary.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RadWordsDictionary.Words
member.summary: Gets the words.

member.summary: Loads the specified stream.
member.param: The stream.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RadWordsDictionary.Load(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Loads the specified words.
member.param: The words.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RadWordsDictionary.ContainsWord(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified word is contained in the dictionary.
member.param: The word.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RadWordsDictionary.GetMetaphoneKey(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the metaphone key.
member.param: The word.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RadWordsDictionary.GetWordsByMetaphoneKey(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the words by metaphone key.
member.param: The word.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.SpellChecker.Proofing.RomanceComplexWordProofing
member.summary: Complex word proofer for French and Italian
